subsection.content: The Secretary may prescribe such regulations as the Secretary deems appropriate to carry out functions under this chapter.
The Secretary may delegate functions under this chapter which are vested in the Secretary to any employee of the Department or any member of the Service.

note.heading: Regulations Regarding Foreign Language Competence Within Foreign Service
note.p: [For abolition of United States Information Agency (other than Broadcasting Board of Governors and International Broadcasting Bureau), transfer of functions, and treatment of references thereto, see sections 6531, 6532, and 6551 of this title.]
